meta.title: Experiment / Optimize Demo (throughput vs process time)
meta.description: A minimal Source -> Queue -> Processor -> Sink line intended for the experiment (parameter sweep) and optimize features. The decision parameter is the processor's process_time. As process_time is reduced, throughput increases monotonically until it saturates at the arrival rate (interarrival=1.0 => 1.0 item/unit), after which further reduction gives no gain. The optimizer (maximize throughput) picks the point where throughput first saturates.

expected.monotone: throughput is non-decreasing as process_time decreases, saturating at arrival rate ~1.0/unit (3600/hour)
expected.optimum: max throughput ~ 1.0/unit reached once process_time <= interarrival (1.0); Sim.optimize(sense=max) returns process_time.a = 1.0 (the largest process_time that already saturates throughput)
expected.tolerance: monotone non-decreasing across the sweep (allowing tiny end-of-run noise at the plateau); best objective within 5% of arrival rate
